name: Emby media server — anti-bot hardening profile

settings.BLACKLIST_USER_AGENT: x22 {|} mb_ereg_replace file_put_contents GPTBot ChatGPT-User OAI-SearchBot ClaudeBot CCBot Diffbot Bytespider Google-Extended meta-externalagent meta-webindexer anthropic-ai CensysInspect RecordedFuture Infrawatch InternetMeasurement Keydrop python-requests python-urllib go-http-client libwww-perl okhttp Java/
settings.CUSTOM_CONF_MODSEC_CRS_emby:
SecRule REQUEST_FILENAME "/web/config.json" "id:1100000,ctl:ruleRemoveById=930130,ctl:ruleRemoveById=949110,nolog"
SecRule REQUEST_FILENAME "@beginsWith /Items/" "id:1100001,ctl:ruleRemoveById=949110,nolog"
SecRule REQUEST_FILENAME "@beginsWith /Users/" "id:1100002,ctl:ruleRemoveById=949110,nolog"

steps.title: Web service — Front service
steps.subtitle: Set your Emby hostname and TLS mode.

steps.title: Security — Blacklist (no captcha)
steps.subtitle: Captcha/antibot challenges break Emby media clients — disabled. UA blacklist and DNSBL applied instead.

steps.title: Security — Rate limiting (media-safe)
steps.subtitle: 20r/s and 20 concurrent connections — safe for media streaming and multiple clients.

steps.title: Security — Auto-ban and WAF
steps.subtitle: Bad behaviour auto-ban with higher threshold (10) to tolerate range-request 4xx from media clients. 404 excluded to avoid false positives on missing media files.

steps.title: Reverse proxy — Emby backend
steps.subtitle: Proxy all traffic + WebSocket to Emby. Replace REVERSE_PROXY_HOST with the actual host:port.
